title: lepidium leventii
intro: Lepidium leventii, also known as Syrian rocket or Turkish pepperwort, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is traditionally used in medicine due to its high content of isothiocyanates, which exhibit potent anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lepidium leventii include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, Lepidium leventii can be consumed as a tea, added to soups and salads, or used in capsule form to leverage its medicinal properties.
